data.description: Themed bundle of 10 small upstream cmux issues covering stability, rendering, theme, crashes, perf, config parsers, and infrastructure. Picks: #3162, #2950, #1764, #3075, #2922, #1036, #2738, #2996, #2997, #2708. Reporters to credit: @knight42, @shaun0927, @gilsiun, @zacharygutt, @Corey-T1000, @austinywang, @tmad4000, @lawrencecchen, @Thinkscape, @exlaw. Plus related-issue reporter whose duplicate closes with the same fix: @tuzisang (#2718). Full rationale + per-pick credits in task note.
data.title: Upstream pull: Stability — render, theme, crashes, perf, config, infra (10 picks)

data.body: Phase 2 PR-status scan complete. Of the 10 picks: **3 have an open upstream PR** (#2950 → PR #2952 by @shaun0927 [self-fix], #3075 → PR #3095 by @austinywang, #1036 → PR #1038 by @lawrencecchen), and **7 have no fixing PR yet** (#3162, #1764, #2922, #2738, #2996, #2997, #2708). Full status: code/c11-private/upstream-watch/picks/2026-04-26-pr-status.md (C11-22 section).
